allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const path=require\(''path''\); const p=path.join\(''C:'',''Users'',''chrom'',''.claude'',''plans'',''shimmying-prancing-clover-agent-a2c375a77ff1495df.md''\); console.log\(p\); fs.writeFileSync\(p, ''test''\);")

Bash(printf '%s\\n' "" "---" "" "## 5. Implementation Phases" "" "### Phase 1: Foundation \(2-3 days\)" "Config structs, CLI, errors, history." "" "- Define serde structs with proper defaults" "- RootConfig uses IndexMap<String, TaskConfig> to preserve order" "- CommandEntry uses custom Deserialize for single-key map format" "- Unified loading: detect extension, use serde_yaml or serde_json" "- Port history.rs with proper error types" "" "### Phase 2: Command Engine \(3-4 days\)" "All 5 command types as async operations, plus task runner." "" "- Command trait with async install/update/uninstall methods" "- CommandContext holds event_tx sender \(key decoupling from UI\)" "- TaskRunner orchestrates parallel/sequential execution" "- tokio::process::Command for shell and git operations" "- tokio::fs + spawn_blocking\(walkdir\) for file operations" "" "### Phase 3: TUI \(3-4 days\)" "ratatui dashboard with real-time progress." "" "- Dashboard: left pane \(task list\), right pane \(logs\), top bar \(mode/progress\), bottom \(keys\)" "- Task states: Pending, Running, Success, Failed, Skipped" "- Navigation: j/k, Enter for detail, Tab for pane switch, q to quit" "- Selection view for --select flag with checkboxes" "- ~60fps event loop: drain events, check input, render" "" "### Phase 4: Integration \(2-3 days\)" "Wire up, CI mode, testing." "" "- --no-tui flag for CI environments \(simple log output\)" "- main.rs spawns runner on tokio task, runs TUI or logger" "- End-to-end testing with real configs" "" "### Phase 5: Polish \(2-3 days\)" "Force flag, dependsOn, Windows, docs." "" "- --force bypasses history checks" "- depends_on field enables DAG-based execution ordering" "- PowerShell support for Windows run commands" "- Shell completions via clap_complete" "" "---" "" "## 6. Key Architectural Decisions" "" "### Why tokio over rayon?" "Tasks are I/O-bound \(files, git, processes\). Tokio provides async process management with output streaming, critical for real-time TUI. Rayon is for CPU-bound parallelism." "" "### Why remove ConfigValue?" "Serde deserializes directly into typed structs: compile-time safety, built-in validation, ~300 fewer lines. Commands deserialize serde_yaml::Value into their own typed args internally." "" "### Why event channels?" "1. Testability: engine works without terminal" "2. Flexibility: swap TUI for CI logging" "3. Thread safety: ratatui is single-threaded" "4. Separation of concerns" "" "### TUI + tokio integration" "App::run loops at ~60fps: try_recv events, poll keyboard, render, tick. Tasks run on separate tokio tasks." "" "---" "" "## 7. Config Backward Compatibility" "" "Existing YAML/JSON configs must work unchanged. Serde structs match current format. CommandEntry uses custom deserialize for the single-key map pattern." "" "---" "" "## 8. New Cargo.toml Dependencies" "" "    tokio 1 \(full features\)" "    ratatui 0.29" "    crossterm 0.28" "    clap 4 \(derive, wrap_help\)" "    serde 1 \(derive\)" "    serde_json 1" "    serde_yaml 0.9" "    thiserror 2" "    miette 7 \(fancy\)" "    tracing 0.1" "    tracing-subscriber 0.3" "    chrono 0.4 \(serde\)" "    shellexpand 3" "    dirs 5" "    walkdir 2" "    indexmap 2 \(serde\)" "" "Dev: tempfile 3" "" "---" "" "## 9. Estimated Effort" "" "| Phase | Scope | Days |" "|-------|-------|------|" "| Phase 1 | Config, CLI, errors | 2-3 |" "| Phase 2 | Commands + runner | 3-4 |" "| Phase 3 | TUI | 3-4 |" "| Phase 4 | Integration | 2-3 |" "| Phase 5 | Polish | 2-3 |" "| Total | | 12-17 |")
